name: IdsEdwMbrLfstylBnfDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT bnf.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_SK, COALESCE(srcSys.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, bnf.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, bnf.EFF_DT_SK, bnf.MBR_SK, bnf.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, bnf.TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF bnf INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.W_MBR_DRVR drvr ON bnf.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = drvr.KEY_VAL_INT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG srcSys ON bnf.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = srcSys.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE drvr.SUBJ_NM = 'MBR_UNIQ_KEY'), cte_lookup AS (SELECT cdMPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK, cdMPPNG.TRGT_CD AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, cdMPPNG.TRGT_CD_NM AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cdMPPNG), cte_joined AS (SELECT main.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_SK, main.SRC_SYS_CD, main.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, main.EFF_DT_SK, main.MBR_SK, main.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, main.TERM_DT_SK, lkp.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, lkp.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM FROM cte_main main LEFT JOIN cte_lookup lkp ON main.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK = lkp.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_transform AS (SELECT MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, EFF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MBR_SK, CASE WHEN MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD END AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, CASE WHEN MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM IS NULL OR dbo.trim_default(MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM END AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM, TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK FROM cte_joined) SELECT * FROM cte_transform

CALLED BY:  EdwMbrExtrLoadDriverSeq
               

PROCESSING:   Pulls data from the MBR_LFSTYL_BNF table in IDS to load the EDW table MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_D

Annotations:
Getting Reference columns data TRGT_CD and 
TRGT_CD_NM
Add CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK and LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK
Job name:
IdsEdwMbrLfstylBnfDExtr
Write MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK
CD_MPPNG_SK
Pull Ref cols 
TRGT_CD
TRGT_CD_NM
Read data from source table MBR_LFSTYL_BNF. Pull TRGT_CD(SRC_SYS_CD) column from CD_MPPNG table by joining key columns SRC_SYS_CD_SK and CD_MPPNG_SK and on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK.
